message:
feat(abi): enhance grp/pwd reentrant APIs, improve ELF loader robustness, and regenerate conformance/CVE arena artifacts

grp_abi/pwd_abi: Enhances getgrnam_r, getgrgid_r, getpwnam_r, getpwuid_r
with improved buffer overflow handling, proper ERANGE retry semantics, and
null-pointer guards. Adds new grp_abi_test cases for edge cases (missing
group, buffer too small, numeric string names). Adds pwd_abi_test coverage.

time_abi: Minor fix to timezone offset calculation edge case.

ELF loader: Improves robustness of PT_LOAD segment validation with bounds
checking for segment sizes that could overflow address calculations.

malloc/size_class: Tightens size class bin selection for small allocations
to reduce internal fragmentation.

stdlib/conversion: Improves strtod/strtof edge case handling for
hexadecimal float parsing with denormalized values.

harness/diff: Enhances conformance diff reporting with structured field
comparison for multi-value outputs.

membrane/tls_cache: Minor fix to TLS cache invalidation ordering.

Regenerates all conformance test artifacts, CVE arena validation results,
release dossier, and runtime_math controller ablation report to reflect the
ABI changes above.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -34,10 +34,10 @@ impl SizeClass {
 
 /// Size class table following a geometric progression.
 ///
-/// Bins 0-7: 16-byte increments (16, 32, 48, 64, 80, 96, 112, 128)
-/// Bins 8-15: 32-byte increments (160, 192, 224, 256, 288, 320, 352, 384)
-/// Bins 16-23: 64-byte increments (448, 512, 576, 640, 704, 768, 832, 896)
-/// Bins 24-31: 128+ byte increments up to 32KB
+/// Bins 0-7:   16-byte steps (16..128)
+/// Bins 8-15:  32-byte steps (160..384)
+/// Bins 16-23: wider steps (448, 512, 640, 768, 896, 1024, 1280, 1536)
+/// Bins 24-31: large small classes (2048..32768)
 const SIZE_TABLE: [usize; NUM_SIZE_CLASSES] = [
     16, 32, 48, 64, 80, 96, 112, 128, // 16-byte steps
     160, 192, 224, 256, 288, 320, 352, 384, // 32-byte steps
